title: Run full quality gates: lint + typecheck + test
description:
## Objective
Run the iteration-wide quality gates and fix any failures before declaring the feature done.

## Scope
No file modifications expected. If a check fails, fix the offending file and re-run.

## Implementation
Run in order:
1. `make typecheck` — green
2. `make lint` — green (includes prettier --check; if prettier complains, run `npx prettier --write <files>` on the files this iteration touched)
3. `make test` — green (full vitest suite; the new computeWeightedTotal tests must be included)

## Tests
The check IS the test. Loop fix → re-run until all three are green. Do NOT close while any check is red.
acceptance_criteria: All three of make typecheck, make lint, make test are green
